573 OXGN_ADMSN_CD OXGN_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Oxygen Therapy (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving oxygen therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
